---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that currently isn't possible or is difficult?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like to see. Include any design ideas, API shapes, or UI mockups if possible.

## Vertical
Which vertical(s) does this apply to?
- [ ] Med Spa
- [ ] Home Services
- [ ] Other (specify):
- [ ] All verticals

## Alternatives Considered
Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've tried.

## Additional Context
Links, references, or other relevant information.
